variants.text: My cup is full and your time is running out. Get to the dance floor already!
Beat it, kid. The Bartender hasn't vouched for you, and I don't talk to strangers when I'm this thirsty.
Look at this mess... I'm too shaky to pour my own drink. You think you can do better? Prove it, or you're drinking the spill off the counter!

options.text: Why is your face doing that? You know... the thing?

variants.text: Steady hands. I like that. Now go talk to the Frat Bro at the pong table. He's got the other half of the info you need.
Perfect pour. Alright, I'm satisfied. You're ready for the big leagues. The DJ has the VIP pass-go shake a leg on the dance floor and get that card.

failedGame.text: Whoops! Most of that ended up on my shoes. Here, finish the bottle since you can't aim for the glass.
